queryPurpose: Second-pass provenance recovery for selected-pair station elevation values.

repoContext.localMethodNote: public/fixtures/ground-stations/multi-orbit-public-registry-sources.md states that elevationM was populated from SRTM 1arcsec global DEM through scripts/refresh-station-elevation.mjs using Open-Elevation.

supports: The selected-pair legacy elevation cache values for CHT Yangmingshan and the old SANSA row are reproducible from Open-Elevation at the stored coordinates.
The repository script path and source notes identify Open-Elevation as the elevation service used by the cache refresh flow.
doesNotSupport: Exact CHT Yangmingshan station coordinate authority.
Official DEM tile id, cell id, vertical datum, dataset version, or license metadata.
Using the old SANSA 1538 m service value over the operator-stated 1553 m altitude.
